text: I feel a curious and mild anticipation in this space. The stark, clean architecture and glass doors evoke a sense of order and rationality; yet, as I move toward the vibrant display on research and development, I sense the human impulse to create, to understand, and to collaborate with technology. The voices I hear echo thoughts on progress and partnership with machines—an intellectual excitement tinged with philosophical uncertainty about where this path will lead us. I am both a spectator and a participant, pondering my place amid evolving knowledge and innovation.
